chapters.title: Tour
chapters.desc: During the assault on the TerraGroup office, a massive explosion erupted on top of one of the nearby high-rises. I got left on my own, with no contact.

chapters.title: Falling Skies
chapters.desc: In the nature reserve, I came across a downed plane - or rather, what's left of it. I've got a strong feeling this plane is important.

chapters.title: The Ticket
chapters.desc: I've got a feeling I've gotten myself into some weird stuff... On the other hand, I'm holding a Ticket out of Tarkov, so it's not all bad.

chapters.title: Batya
chapters.desc: Turns out BEAR didn't send just regular squads into Tarkov, there were real SOF guys here. I'd like to know more about those units and what exactly they were doing.

chapters.title: The Unheard
chapters.desc: I came across a strange note on a TerraGroup sheet. It mentions the will of The Unheard and some fuel needed for purification.

chapters.title: Blue Fire
chapters.desc: During the raid on the office, some kind of special weapon went off on one of the roofs... I remember a bright blue flash before I blacked out.

chapters.title: They Are Already Here
chapters.desc: I came across something strange in Tarkov. That circle and those symbols have to mean something. But what exactly?

chapters.title: Accidental Witness
chapters.desc: Kozlov was probably not the only debtor in the industrial zone. Perhaps he was being hunted for a reason?

chapters.title: The Labyrinth
chapters.desc: Jaeger's friend is trying to learn what happened to the BEAR squad that stormed The Labyrinth during the evacuation.

chapters.title: Boreas
chapters.desc: A distress signal from the icebreaker Boreas leads through Woods and Lighthouse, then splits into infill (BTR Driver) and exfill (Prapor) branches before boarding the hovercraft at Shoreline.
